arrival.harmonyTooLowToPerform: Band's harmony too low to perform!
arrival.restedAtStop: Rested at stop. Band feels better.
arrival.showCancelled: Show cancelled! The band refused to go on stage due to low harmony.
arrival.specialNothingHappened: A mysterious place, but nothing happened.
bandhq.setlist.selectOne: Select at least one song to practice!
blood_bank.description: Desperate times call for desperate measures. Sell your blood to the underground clinic. It pays well, but the physical and mental toll on the band is severe.
blood_bank.subtitle: BLOOD FOR CASH
blood_bank.success_toast: Blood donated successfully. Gain +{{deltaMoney}}€, Cost -{{deltaHarmony}} Harmony, -{{deltaStamina}} Stamina. Controversy +{{deltaControversy}}.
blood_bank.title: THE VOID CLINIC
blood_bank.warning: WARNING: BAND IS TOO WEAK TO SURVIVE DONATION.
chatter.random4: my ears are bleeding (in a bad way)
clinic.heal_success: +{{stamina}} Stamina, +{{mood}} Mood. The void embraces you.
clinic.lore: Sacrifice money and fame for immediate cybernetic enhancement or synthetic healing.
clinic.not_enough_fame: Not enough fame. The void demands sacrifice.
clinic.title: THE VOID CLINIC
confirm_delete_text: Are you sure you want to delete your save game? This cannot be undone.

contraband.description: Artifacts and strange detritus gathered from the void. Use with caution.
contraband.title: CONTRABAND STASH

contract.p2: The Artist agrees to <0>subliminally insert corporate messaging</0> during all live performances in sector 4.
contract.title: Binding Agreement
contract.warning: Failure to comply will result in <0>immediate termination of organic functions</0>.
crash.message: The simulation has crashed. Reboot required.
crash.title: SYSTEM FAILURE
crisis.desc: The transmission just dropped halfway to Leipzig. You have a gig in 4 hours. Do you burn through your cash for a sketchy mechanic, or risk showing up late and losing face?
crisis.title: VAN BREAKDOWN
dark_web_leak.description: Leak unreleased tracks to the dark web to instantly boost your fame and zealotry. But beware, it will spark controversy and damage band harmony.
dark_web_leak.title: Dark Web Data Leak
deals.aggressiveDesc: Demand +50% upfront. Failure loses the deal completely.
deals.chooseApproach: Choose your approach. Your fame and traits affect the outcome.
deals.persuasiveDesc: Try for +20% upfront & +10% per gig. Failure worsens terms (-10%).
deals.safeDesc: Attempt to get +10% upfront. High chance of success.
delete_warning: WARNING: This action is irreversible. All tour progress will be lost.
detailedStats.mode.label: Mode
detailedStats.noActiveQuests: No active quests. Stay toxic to trigger events.
detailedStats.noRegionalData: No regional data yet. Play gigs to build reputation.
enter_alias_desc: Enter your alias for the global underground network.
error.advanceDayFailed: Could not advance day. Please try again.
error.insufficient_fame: Not enough fame. You need {{cost}} fame.
error.mapGenerationFailedReturnToMenu: Map generation failed. Returning to menu for recovery.
features.title: FEATURE LIST
hazard.toxicOverload: TOXIC OVERLOAD DETECTED // SEVERE SYSTEM STRESS // STAY FOCUSED
hq.title: BAND HQ
hq.voidTrader.subtitle: RARE CONTRABAND FOR THE FAMOUS
hq.voidTrader.title: THE VOID TRADER
leaderboard.unavailable: Leaderboard service unavailable in local mode.
mainMenu.existingSave.desc: A save game already exists. Do you want to load it or start a new tour?
mainMenu.existingSave.title: SAVE FILE DETECTED
merch_press.description: Print bootleg shirts and press illegal vinyls in the basement. High risk, high reward.
merch_press.risk_warning: WARNING: {{risk}}% CHANCE OF EQUIPMENT FAILURE (-{{harmonyCostOnFail}} HARMONY)
merch_press.subtitle: BOOTLEG OPERATION
merch_press.title: UNDERGROUND MERCH PRESS
minigames.amp.ampsReady: The tone is clean. Ready to shred.
minigames.amp.completion.title: AMP CALIBRATED
minigames.amp.managerMad: Feedback destroyed speakers! Playing with malus.
minigames.amp.rules.penalty: High errors cause extreme stress and lose the gig.
minigames.amp.rules.time: Match the frequency within the time limit.
minigames.amp.title: AMP_CALIBRATION
minigames.kabelsalat.ampsReady: Amps are glowing, mics are open.
minigames.kabelsalat.errors.noAmp: AMP IS OFF! VOLTAGE SPIKE DESTROYED SPEAKERS!
minigames.kabelsalat.rules.penalty: A mistake rips out all existing connections.
minigames.kabelsalat.rules.rule1Text: No plugging without ground (PWR)! Danger to life!
minigames.kabelsalat.rules.rule2Text: Synths (MIDI) and mics (XLR) need an active AMP (JACK) first.
minigames.kabelsalat.title: HARDWARE_RIGGING
pirate_radio.description: Hack local frequencies and broadcast your rawest tracks. The signal will reach the desperate and the disillusioned, boosting your fame and feeding the cult.
pirate_radio.success: Broadcast complete. The signal lives. Fame +{{deltaFame}}, Zealotry +{{deltaZealotry}}, Controversy +{{deltaControversy}}, Harmony {{deltaHarmony}}, Cost {{cost}}€.
pirate_radio.title: PIRATE RADIO BROADCAST
postGig.gameOverBankrupt: GAME OVER: BANKRUPT! The tour is over.
postGig.socialOptionsUnavailable: Social options are unavailable right now.
postOptions.comm_gear_review.message: {{member}} finally revealed the secret of the tone. Guitar nerds are losing it.
postOptions.comm_sellout_ad.name: Shameless Sellout Sponsorship
postOptions.drama_crowdsurf_fail.failMes: {{member}} got dropped. It was just sad to watch.
postOptions.drama_crowdsurf_fail.success: {{member}} ate pavement, but the fans thought it was hilarious.
postOptions.drama_tour_bus_prank.message: {{member}} loved it. The rest of the band is annoyed.
postOptions.errors.missingBandMembers: Post option {{postId}} requires at least one band member.
postOptions.influencerTraitDramaMagnet: Massive reach, but it came with some toxic drama.
postOptions.influencerTraitTechSavvy: The gear nerds loved the technical breakdown.
postOptions.noAffordableInfluencers: You cannot afford any available influencers right now.
postOptions.perf_ego_flex.message: {{member}} is feeling like a rock god. The rest of the band? Not so much.
postOptions.perf_smashed_gear.message: {{member}}'s gear was destroyed! Viral AF but expensive.
postOptions.radicalize_fans.message: Your hardcore fans loved it. Casuals were disturbed.
postOptions.radicalize_fans.name: Radicalize Fans
postOptions.selloutMessage: You got paid. The fans are calling you sellouts.

travel.confirmTravelPrompt: {{location}} ({{distance}}km) | Travel Costs: {{travelCost}}€ | Daily Upkeep: {{dailyCost}}€ | Total Cash Impact: {{totalCost}}€ | Fuel: {{fuelLiters}}L — Click again to confirm
travel.errors.alreadyPlayedHere: You just played a gig here! Hit the road and find a new crowd.
travel.errors.bookingRefusedBlacklisted: Booking refused: {{location}} has permanently blacklisted you!
travel.errors.bookingRefusedRegionalRepu: Booking refused: The venue in {{location}} blacklisted you due to poor regional reputation!
travel.errors.gameOverStranded: GAME OVER: Stranded! Cannot travel and cannot afford fuel.

travel.errors.notEnoughMoneyForTravel: Not enough money for gas and food!

map.text: Travel between cities to play Gigs. Traveling costs Fuel and Time. Watch your supplies.
map.title: THE MAP

perform.text: Hit the notes when they reach the bottom. Arrow Keys or Click the lanes. High Combo = More Fame.
perform.title: PERFORM

stats.text: Keep an eye on Health (Mood) and Money. If Money hits 0, game over. If Mood hits 0, the band breaks up.
stats.title: STATS

welcome.text: You are the manager of NEUROTOXIC. Your goal: survive the tour, earn fame, and don't go broke.
welcome.title: WELCOME TO THE GRIND

offline.needRefresh: New content available, click on reload button to update.

travel.rivalEncounter: Your rival band, {{rivalName}}, is in town!

featureList.sec0.title: 1. Core Structure and Game Phases
featureList.sec1.title: 2. Core Gameplay during Gig
featureList.sec1.items.2: Song-based shows with real note and timing logic
featureList.sec1.items.3: Audio initialization and retry flow if audio is blocked
featureList.sec1.items.7: Score, Combo, Accuracy, Miss, and Health/Overload Tracking
featureList.sec1.items.9: Dynamic performance modifiers from band status and equipment
featureList.sec1.items.10: Multi-song setlists within the core gig system
featureList.sec2.title: 3. Songs and Performance Content
featureList.sec2.items.1: Songs feature: Name, BPM, Duration, Difficulty, Note Pattern, Crowd Appeal, Stamina Drain
featureList.sec3.title: 4. Pre-Gig Features
featureList.sec3.items.2: Gig Modifiers: Soundcheck, Promo, Merch Table, Catering / Energy, Guest List
featureList.sec3.items.5: Event triggers occurring in the Pre-Gig phase
featureList.sec3.items.6: Random selection of one of several Pre-Gig minigames before the actual Gig
featureList.sec4.title: 5. Pre-Gig Minigames
featureList.sec4.items.0: Roadie Run: Top-down transport/pickup minigame. Equipment damage as a potential outcome.
featureList.sec4.items.1: Cable Mess / Hardware Rigging: Cable and socket connection minigame. Time limit. Shock/error states. Power connection logic.
featureList.sec4.items.2: Amp Calibration: Keep sliders on target values. Score based on stability. Completion leads directly into the Gig.
featureList.sec5.title: 6. Travel and Map Features
featureList.sec5.items.0: Graph-based Tour Map with nodes and connections
featureList.sec5.items.1: Visibility and accessibility logic for destinations
featureList.sec5.items.9: Venue access dependent on: Map connections, Resources, Blacklist, Regional Reputation, Story Flags, Prove-Yourself restrictions
featureList.sec6.title: 7. Travel Minigame
featureList.sec6.items.0: Tourbus / Highway / Travel Minigame: Driving/dodging minigame. Van damage. Distance progression. HUD + Touch/Mobile controls. Results affect subsequent travel/economy outcomes.
featureList.sec7.title: 8. Overworld Management
featureList.sec7.items.0: Overworld HUD displaying career and band status
featureList.sec7.items.3: Save functionality from the Overworld menu
featureList.sec7.items.5: Menu Categories: Management, Side Hustles, Logistics, System
featureList.sec8.title: 9. Band HQ
featureList.sec8.items.0: Tabs for: Stats, Details, Shop, Upgrades, Setlist, Leaderboard, Settings, Void Trader
featureList.sec9.title: 10. Shop, Upgrade, and Inventory Systems
featureList.sec10.title: 11. Contraband and Void Trader
featureList.sec10.items.1: Targeting individual band members when using items
featureList.sec10.items.4: Unlock Void Trader via high Controversy value
featureList.sec10.items.5: Purchase Contraband with Fame instead of Money
featureList.sec11.title: 12. Band and Character System
featureList.sec11.items.1: Individual stats and states: Mood, Stamina, Skills, Charisma, Technical, Improv, Composition, Relationships, Traits, Equipment
featureList.sec11.items.2: Band-wide stats: Harmony, Luck, Inventory Slots, Performance Modifiers
featureList.sec11.items.5: Harmony regeneration during travel as a system flag
featureList.sec11.items.6: Band can effectively block its own progress through poor states
featureList.sec12.title: 13. Clinic / Void Clinic
featureList.sec12.items.1: Enhance / Cyber Upgrade per band member
featureList.sec12.items.2: Costs increase based on the number of Clinic visits
featureList.sec12.items.7: Leaving the Clinic initiates a distinct scene flow
featureList.sec13.title: 14. Quests
featureList.sec13.items.5: Quest types with rewards such as: Money, Fame, Fans, Harmony, Skill Point, Item
featureList.sec14.title: 15. Events and Story Systems
featureList.sec14.items.10: Story Update Toast / New Quest Toast
featureList.sec15.title: 16. Social, Fame, and Community Systems
featureList.sec15.items.0: Social Metrics: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Newsletter, Viral
featureList.sec15.items.10: Virality Score based on: Performance, Venue, Events, Traits
featureList.sec15.items.11: Post-Gig Social Strategy with selectable post options
featureList.sec15.items.13: Influencer/Industry update slots in post results
featureList.sec16.title: 17. Post-Gig System
featureList.sec16.items.0: Multi-phase Post-Gig evaluation: Report, Social, Deals, Complete
featureList.sec16.items.2: Social Media decision making after the show
featureList.sec16.items.7: Game Over check following financial ruin
featureList.sec17.title: 18. Brand Deals / Sponsoring / Record Deals
featureList.sec17.items.1: Deal Types: Sponsorship, Endorsement, Record Deal
featureList.sec17.items.2: Deal requirements based on: Followers, Trend, Traits, Zealotry, Controversy
featureList.sec17.items.3: Alignment System: EVIL, CORPORATE, INDIE, SUSTAINABLE, GOOD, NEUTRAL
featureList.sec17.items.4: Only one active deal at a time
featureList.sec17.items.8: Deal Negotiation with strategies: Safe, Persuasive, Aggressive
featureList.sec18.title: 19. Side Hustles / Risky Side Actions
featureList.sec18.items.0: Pirate Radio: Costs, Fame Gain, Zealotry Gain, Controversy Gain, Harmony Cost, limited to once per day
featureList.sec18.items.1: Merch Press: Costs, Fame/Loyalty/Controversy Effects, Failure Chance, Harmony Loss on failure
featureList.sec18.items.2: Blood Bank / Void Clinic Cash Run: Sell blood for money, Harmony Loss, Stamina Loss for all members, Controversy Increase, payout scales with Fame Level
featureList.sec18.items.3: Dark Web Leak: Money Cost, Fame and Zealotry Gain, High Controversy Increase, Harmony Cost, requires specific Controversy level, limited to once per day
featureList.sec19.title: 20. Economy and Resources
featureList.sec19.items.0: Money, Fame, Followers, Harmony, Mood, Stamina, Fuel, Van Condition
featureList.sec19.items.10: Wealth Drain / Asset Loss event at high wealth
featureList.sec20.title: 21. Leaderboards
featureList.sec20.items.1: Views for: Balance, Song, Fame, Followers, Distance, Conflicts, Stage Dives
featureList.sec20.items.4: Fallback behavior when API is locally unavailable
featureList.sec21.title: 22. Persistence and Meta-Progression
featureList.sec21.items.9: Global State with comprehensive Reducer logic
featureList.sec22.title: 23. Additional UX/System Features
featureList.sec22.items.7: Defensive Error Handling in Save, Event, Social, and Audio paths
